name: Healing Potion
description: Drink to restore 2 HP.

name: Potion of Vitality
description: Drink to restore 3 HP.

name: Icon of Ravenloft
description: A holy icon that can repel the undead. Undead monsters in adjacent tiles cannot target you.

name: Silver Dagger
description: A gleaming silver dagger. +1 to hit against undead.

name: Holy Water
description: Throw at an undead monster. +7 to hit, 2 damage, and the monster is stunned until end of its next turn.

name: Wooden Stake
description: Drive through a vampire's heart. +7 to hit, 3 damage against vampires.

name: Torch
description: Light a torch to illuminate the area. All heroes on this tile gain +1 to hit until end of turn.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
description: A magical mirror that can trap souls. Once per adventure, you can force a monster to reroll its attack.

name: Skull of Kavan
description: A glowing skull that whispers secrets. Once per turn, you may reroll a d20.

name: Glyph of Warding
description: Place this glyph on a tile. Monsters cannot enter that tile.

name: Scroll of Healing
description: Read this scroll to heal yourself or an adjacent hero for 2 HP.

name: Scroll of Fireball
description: Read this scroll to attack all monsters on a target tile. +6 to hit, 1 damage.

name: Amulet of Protection
description: A protective amulet. +2 AC.

name: Ring of Strength
description: A golden ring that enhances your might. +1 to damage.

name: Boots of Speed
description: Enchanted boots that make you swift. +2 speed.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
description: Wear this cloak to become invisible. Monsters cannot target you until your next turn.

name: Hammer of Smashing
description: A heavy warhammer. +2 to hit, 2 damage.

name: Staff of Arcane Power
description: A magical staff. +1 to hit, 1 damage. Can cast Fireball once per encounter.

name: Blessing of the Morninglord
description: Receive a divine blessing. All heroes gain +2 to hit until end of turn.

name: Potion of Heroism
description: Drink to gain courage. Gain +2 to hit and +1 damage until end of turn.

name: Potion of Clarity
description: Drink to clear your mind. Remove all conditions from yourself.

name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt
description: Read this scroll to attack a monster. +7 to hit, 2 damage.

name: Ring of Regeneration
description: A silver band that knits wounds. Heal 1 HP at start of each of your turns.

name: Amulet of Lifeforce
description: A pulsing amulet that protects from death. Once per adventure, if you would be reduced to 0 HP, you are instead reduced to 1 HP.

name: Boots of Leaping
description: Magical boots that let you jump. You can move through monsters without provoking attacks.

name: Cloak of Shadows
description: A dark cloak that blends with darkness. Monsters have -2 to hit against you.

name: Gauntlet of Power
description: A mighty gauntlet. +3 to hit, 2 damage.

name: Potion of Giant Strength
description: Drink to gain incredible strength. +3 to hit and +2 damage until end of turn.

name: Scroll of Teleport
description: Read this scroll to teleport to any revealed tile within 2 tiles.

name: Gem of Seeing
description: A magical gem that reveals hidden things. You can see through secret doors and invisible monsters.

name: Helm of Brilliance
description: A shining helm that illuminates darkness. All heroes on your tile gain +1 to hit in darkness.

name: Bottle of Wishes
description: A rare bottle containing a genie. Use once per adventure to heal all heroes to full HP.

name: Animal Companion
description: A loyal animal joins your party. Place a Wolf on an adjacent tile. The Wolf acts on your turn.

name: Portrait of Ravenloft
description: A painting of Strahd's castle. Once per adventure, you can force Strahd to reroll a d20.
